title: A Comprehensive Survey on Model Quantization for Deep Neural Networks in Image Classification
clusterDescription: This cluster covers foundational and hardware-aware quantization methods for deep neural networks, focusing on deploying compressed models efficiently on edge devices and accelerators.

title: GPTQ: Accurate Post-Training Quantization for Generative Pre-trained Transformers
clusterDescription: This cluster focuses on quantizing large language models (LLMs) to reduce memory and compute costs while preserving generation quality, a critical challenge as models scale to billions of parameters.

title: LLM.int8(): 8-bit Matrix Multiplication for Transformers at Scale
clusterDescription: This cluster focuses on quantizing large language models (LLMs) to reduce memory and compute costs while preserving generation quality, a critical challenge as models scale to billions of parameters.

title: SmoothQuant: Accurate and Efficient Post-Training Quantization for Large Language Models
clusterDescription: This cluster addresses the challenge of quantizing activations in transformer models, where outlier values make naive quantization lossy. Papers here propose methods to smooth or redistribute activation distributions before quantization.

title: AWQ: Activation-aware Weight Quantization for LLM Compression and Acceleration
clusterDescription: This cluster addresses the challenge of quantizing activations in transformer models, where outlier values make naive quantization lossy. Papers here propose methods to smooth or redistribute activation distributions before quantization.

title: Q-Diffusion: Quantizing Diffusion Models
clusterDescription: This cluster explores quantization applied specifically to diffusion-based generative models, where the iterative denoising process introduces unique sensitivity to numerical precision that standard quantization methods fail to handle.

title: EfficientDiffusion: Post-Training Quantization for Diffusion Probabilistic Models
clusterDescription: This cluster explores quantization applied specifically to diffusion-based generative models, where the iterative denoising process introduces unique sensitivity to numerical precision that standard quantization methods fail to handle.

title: ZeroQuant: Efficient and Affordable Post-Training Quantization for Large-Scale Transformers
clusterDescription: This cluster covers foundational and hardware-aware quantization methods for deep neural networks, focusing on deploying compressed models efficiently on edge devices and accelerators.

title: MQBench: Towards Reproducible and Deployable Model Quantization Benchmark
clusterDescription: This cluster covers foundational and hardware-aware quantization methods for deep neural networks, focusing on deploying compressed models efficiently on edge devices and accelerators.

title: Quantization Aware Attack: Enhancing Transferable Adversarial Attacks by Model Quantization
clusterDescription: This cluster examines calibration-driven and data-efficient quantization approaches, including methods that operate without labeled data and techniques that combine pruning with quantization for aggressive compression.
